_comment: Curated MCP server catalog. Hand-picked, audited, runnable without external auth (LobeHub MARKET_CLIENT_ID etc). Searched FIRST before falling through to LobeHub's open marketplace. Identifier format: 'npm:<package>' for npx-runnable servers, 'github:owner/repo' for git-cloneable ones. Add new entries as you vet them — keep this list small and high-trust.

items.name: Postgres
items.description: Read-only Postgres queries via natural language. Connect via DATABASE_URL.

items.name: SQLite
items.description: Query and inspect a local SQLite database.

items.name: GitHub
items.description: Read repos, issues, PRs, file contents, search code. Needs GITHUB_TOKEN.

items.name: GitLab
items.description: Read GitLab projects, issues, merge requests. Needs GITLAB_TOKEN.

items.name: Slack
items.description: Send / read Slack messages, list channels, manage threads. Needs SLACK_BOT_TOKEN.

items.name: Google Drive
items.description: Browse and read Google Drive files. Needs OAuth.

items.name: Filesystem
items.description: Read, write, list local files within a sandboxed root.

items.name: Fetch
items.description: HTTP fetch + extract clean text from web pages.

items.name: Brave Search
items.description: Web search via Brave's API. Needs BRAVE_API_KEY.

items.name: Puppeteer
items.description: Browser automation — navigate, click, extract from any web page.

items.name: Memory (knowledge graph)
items.description: Lightweight knowledge graph for cross-session memory.

items.name: Time
items.description: Current time, timezone conversion, date arithmetic.

items.name: AWS Knowledge Bases
items.description: Query AWS Bedrock Knowledge Bases. Needs AWS creds.

items.name: Starknet RPC
items.description: Starknet block / tx / contract queries via JSON-RPC. Configurable RPC endpoint.

items.name: EVM RPC (multi-chain)
items.description: Generic EVM JSON-RPC: Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, etc.

items.name: Solana RPC
items.description: Solana account / tx / program queries via JSON-RPC.
